hooks.command: git fetch origin --quiet 2>/dev/null; b=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); behind=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/$b 2>/dev/null); if [ "${behind:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then if git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null && git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null && git merge --ff-only "origin/$b" --quiet 2>/dev/null; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Synced $b: fast-forwarded $behind commit(s) from origin.\"}"; else echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"origin/$b is $behind commit(s) ahead but tree not clean or not fast-forwardable - run git pull manually.\"}"; fi; fi; true
